query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE branchId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM branches)) as orphaned_users,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'delivery' AND branchId IS NULL) as delivery_without_branch,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE branchId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM branches)) as orphaned_orders,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE deliveryPersonId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE role = 'delivery')) as orders_invalid_delivery;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Kz4ErUoqpGjgNg.dff2f62e1b6f --database nuXmcfyGeo7bacZX3ZUfKS --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE branchId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM branches)) as orphaned_users,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'delivery' AND branchId IS NULL) as delivery_without_branch,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE branchId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM branches)) as orphaned_orders,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE deliveryPersonId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE role = 'delivery')) as orders_invalid_delivery;
